stemHtml:
Given the following information:

Price ratio: 0.898 
Air distance: 2650 NAM 
Maximum Takeoff Mass (MTOM): 208 000 kg 
Maximum Landing Mass (MLM): 184 500 kg 
Planned Takeoff Fuel: 30 000 kg 
Trip Fuel: 23 000 kg

What is the planned Take-off Mass (TOM), and does it comply with MTOM and MLM limits?

options.a: Planned TOM: 208 000 kg; complies with MTOM but exceeds MLM.
options.b: Planned TOM: 203 000 kg; complies with both MTOM and MLM.
options.c: Planned TOM: 210 000 kg; exceeds both MTOM and MLM.
options.d: Planned TOM: 198 500 kg; complies with both MTOM and MLM.
